parameters.message:
🔐 *PIN + TOTP Required*

This is an action command and requires verification.

Usage: `/[command] [PIN] [TOTP]`

Example: `/resolve ORD-12345 1234 567890`

Get your PIN from your secure vault.
Use your authenticator app for TOTP code.

parameters.functionCode:
// Handler: help - show available commands
const helpText = `*Admin Commands*

📊 *Monitor (no auth)*
/start - Welcome message
/help - This help list
/balance - Provider balances
/pool - Free trial pool status
/orders [today|pending|failed] - Order list
/revenue [today|week|month] - Revenue report
/customer [name] - Customer lookup
/alerts - Recent alerts

⚠️ *Actions (PIN + TOTP required)*
/resolve [order_id] [PIN] [TOTP] - Fulfill order
/refund [order_id] [PIN] [TOTP] - Issue refund
/pause [message] [PIN] [TOTP] - Pause platform
/unpause [PIN] [TOTP] - Resume platform
/rotate [customer] [PIN] [TOTP] - Rotate credentials
/block [customer] [reason] [PIN] [TOTP] - Block customer
/unblock [customer] [PIN] [TOTP] - Unblock customer`;

return [{ json: { ...$json, response: helpText } }];
